DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF NONY CONCEPCION'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING DEFENDANT FEDERICO PARANGAN'S RESPONSE TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION, INSPECTION AND COPYING OF DOCUMENTS AND TANGIBLE THINGS IS GRANTED. THE STATEMENTS CONTAINED IN THE OPPOSITION ARE NOT SUFFICIENT AND ARE NOT RESPONSES AS REQUIRED BY THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. DEFENDANT FEDERICO PARANGAN IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PREPARE A WRITTEN ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Frederico Parangan appearing on his own behalf. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by plaintiff nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Demand For Production Inspection Adn Copying Of Docments And Tanglible Things And Imposing Money Sanction;
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
NONY V. CONCEPCION, PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY, APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA.
FREDERICO PARANGAN, DEFENDANT AND OPPOSING PARTY, APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA.

After argument by parties, the court adopted its tentative ruling as modified. PLAINTIFF NONY CONCEPCION's Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Mercedes Trono's Response To Demand For Production, Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Tangible Things is granted. The statements contained in the opposition are not sufficient and are not responses as required by the Code Of Civil Procedure. Defendant Mercedes Trono is ordered to respond within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is ordered to prepare a written order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Demand For Production Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Tangible Things And Imposing Money Sanctions;
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
NONY V. CONCEPCION, PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY, APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA.
FREDERICO PARANGAN, DEFENDANT AND OPPOSING PARTY, APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA.

After argument by parties, the court adopted its tentative ruling as modified. PLAINTIFF NONY CONCEPCION's Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Federico Parangan's Response To Demand For Production, Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Tangible Things is granted. The statements contained in the opposition are not sufficient and are not responses as required by the Code Of Civil Procedure. Defendant Federico Parangan is ordered to respond within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is ordered to prepare a written order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
